class.name: isaac_ros_deploy_ros2_control/DisableController
class.description: Controller that disables all joints by setting kp=0, kd=0. The robot will collapse under gravity when this controller is active.

class.name: isaac_ros_deploy_ros2_control/FreezeController
class.description: Simple position-hold controller that captures joint positions at activation and continuously commands those positions to hold the robot in place.

class.name: isaac_ros_deploy_ros2_control/ForwardJointCommandController
class.description: Forwards joint commands to hardware interfaces. Subscribes to either JointCommand (topic) or JointState (joint_state_topic) and writes position, velocity, effort, kp, and kd to hardware command interfaces.

class.name: isaac_ros_deploy_ros2_control/InferenceController
class.description: Inference controller wrapping isaac_deploy_core::InferenceController. Runs neural network policies with flexible input/output configuration.

class.name: isaac_ros_deploy_ros2_control/SafetyController
class.description: Chainable safety controller wrapping isaac_deploy_core::SafetyController. Applies blend ratio-based.
